şu an bir yemek yapıyorum, güzel olursa gelenekselimiz olabilir bebek, yaparım sana da

We would like to confirm that, as requested, your photos and all galleries associated with your name have now been removed from our system.
At the same time, we wanted to take a moment to share how much we have truly valued our long-standing collaboration. It has been a great pleasure to feature more than 30 wonderful projects of yours on our platform, and to see your work inspire both boudoir photographers and models within the community.
We sincerely feel that your decision to retire and step away from sharing your work is a loss for the boudoir photography scene, which holds a very special and niche place in the art world. If you would be open to it, we would truly love to continue publishing your projects  or only the specific images or projects you personally choose to share with us. Of course, this would be entirely based on your preferences and comfort.
We kindly invite you to reconsider your decision and truly hope to hear positive news from you. Regardless of the outcome, we are grateful to have had the opportunity to collaborate with such a talented and valuable artist.
We would like to confirm that, as requested, we have drafted all your photos and galleries associated with your name.
